document_info.document_type: Fleet Schedule / Driver Roster / MVR Data (Excel Workbook — 3 Sheets)

business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial trucking and freight transportation; fleet includes extra-heavy Class 8 sleeper and day-cab tractors, heavy/medium/light trucks, private passenger vehicles, and dry-van and flatbed trailers

coverages_discussed.notes: 37 scheduled vehicles: 12 Extra Heavy Trucks, 3 Heavy Trucks, 2 Medium Trucks, 5 Light Trucks, 2 Private Passenger, 13 Trailers. 40 scheduled drivers. VINs provided for all units.
Fleet spans model years 2015–2024. Two older trailers (2015 Hyundai Translead #31, 2017 Fontaine Genesis #35) may have limited ACV. Majority of power units are 2021–2024 vintage.

positives: 5 of 40 drivers (12.5%) carry fully clean MVRs: Kevin Anderson, Sean O'Brien, Katherine Taylor, Paul Nelson, Rebecca Kim

Driver tenure is strong overall; average experience across fleet is approximately 19 years; top drivers include George Adams (33 yrs), William Kowalski (31 yrs), James Patterson and Michael Turner (28 yrs each)
Power unit fleet is predominantly modern: 10 of 12 Extra Heavy Trucks are model year 2022–2024; all Heavy and Medium Trucks are 2022–2024
Well-recognized OEM mix for Extra Heavy units: Freightliner Cascadia, Kenworth T680, Peterbilt 579, Volvo VNL 860, International LT, Mack Anthem — all with established parts and service networks
Trailer fleet includes current-generation dry-van products from Great Dane, Wabash, Utility, and Fontaine, with most units 2022–2024
concerns: 2 drivers carry Major Violation status — Scott Murphy (#27): 3 violations, 2 accidents; Jack Reed (#39): 3 violations, 2 accidents — both represent potential non-renewal or exclusion candidates
1 driver classified Accident status with no violations — Andre Mitchell (#19): 0 violations, 2 accidents — indicates fault or frequency pattern outside standard violation tracking
5 additional drivers carry 2 reported accidents each: Patrick Murphy (#20), Carlos Ramirez (#22), Helen Anderson (#28), Dennis Kelly (#40) — elevated accident frequency sub-group
Fleet-wide MVR totals: 39 violations and 40 accidents across 40 drivers; only 5 drivers are fully clean
Daniel White (#12) carries 2 violations under Minor Violations status

Several driver license numbers do not conform to standard OH format (OH-XX######): Justin Morales (#26) — HI493037; Scott Murphy (#27) — ZI495688; Raymond Ortiz (#31) — W02183487518; Rebecca Kim (#35) — O79303268120; and others — license validity and state matching should be verified
3 drivers hold out-of-state licenses while listed with OH association: Raymond Ortiz — IL (W02183487518), Rebecca Kim — IL (O79303268120), Debra Jackson — TX (35291097)
Janet Perez (#38) is a young driver (DOB 1999-02-08, age ~25) with only 4 years experience and 1 violation on record; warrants review against company minimum age/experience guidelines
Oldest fleet units include a 2015 Hyundai Translead Dry Van and a 2017 Fontaine Genesis trailer — potential maintenance and physical damage valuation concerns
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: MVR data for all 40 drivers: 5 clear (12.5%), 32 minor violations (80%), 2 major violations (5%) — Scott Murphy and Jack Reed each with 3 violations and 2 accidents, and 1 accident-only record (2.5%) — Andre Mitchell with 2 accidents. Fleet aggregate: 39 total violations and 40 total reported accidents. Drivers with 2+ accidents total 7 individuals (Andre Mitchell, Patrick Murphy, Carlos Ramirez, Helen Anderson, Scott Murphy, Jack Reed, Dennis Kelly).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Fleet of 37 units: 12 Extra Heavy Trucks (Freightliner Cascadia [4 units incl. 1 Day Cab], Kenworth T680 [2 units incl. 1 Day Cab], Peterbilt 579 [2 units], Volvo VNL 860, International LT, Mack Anthem — MY 2021–2024); 3 Heavy Trucks (Freightliner M2 112 MY2024, International MV607 MY2023, Hino 338 MY2022); 2 Medium Trucks (Isuzu NPR-HD MY2024, Ford E-450 MY2023); 5 Light Trucks (Ford Transit 350 MY2024, Ram ProMaster 2500 MY2023, Ford F-250 MY2024, Chevrolet Silverado 2500 MY2023, Ford F-150 MY2024); 2 Private Passenger (Toyota Camry MY2023, Chevrolet Suburban MY2024); 13 Trailers (Great Dane Champion SE [2], Great Dane Everest TL [1], Wabash DuraPlate HD [2], Utility 4000D-X Composite [2], Utility 3000R [1], Hyundai Translead Dry Van [2], Fontaine Revolution 51 [1], Fontaine Infinity 48 [1], Fontaine Genesis [1] — MY 2015–2024). 40 drivers licensed across OH, PA, IL, and TX with experience ranging from 4 to 33 years.
